taskTemplate.name: Prepare Payoff Letters
taskTemplate.description: Prepare and send payoff letters for existing liens being paid off at closing

subTaskTemplate.name: Reconcile Payoff Letters
subTaskTemplate.description: Reconcile Payoff Letters – Reconcile payoff letters to VOL entries. Adjust account numbers and mailing address as needed. Enter Certified Mail Tracking number in the Other Comments field. Use the Payoff Letters Button to obtain the letters and print them.
subTaskTemplate.type: Prepare Payoff Letters – Reconcile Payoff Letters

subTaskTemplate.name: Save Payoff Letters to eFolder
subTaskTemplate.description: Save Payoff Letters to eFolder – Save all payoff letters to the loan eFolder.
subTaskTemplate.type: Prepare Payoff Letters – Save Payoff Letters to eFolder

subTaskTemplate.name: Prepare Envelopes
subTaskTemplate.description: Prepare Envelopes – Prepare envelopes with the recipient address and certified mail stickers for each payoff letter.
